MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Financial Discovery
Off Calendar Aug-13-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JULIA SCHAEFER, MICHAEL MIZUNO, HALEY NUSBAUM, ERIC NUSBAUM's Motion For Financial Discovery.

Plaintiff's motion for pre-trial discovery of defendants financial condition is denied. Plaintiffs have not sufficiently established a substantial probability of prevailing on their claim for punitive damages. See Civ. Code, 3295(c); Jabro v. Superior Court (2002) 95 Cal.App.4th 754. The court has weighed the evidence presented by both sides and does not find there is a strong likelihood plaintiffs will prevail on their punitive damages claim. Guardado v. Superior Court (2008) 163 Cal.App.4th 91.

The Court will issue an order confirming the tentative ruling.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA AND PIERCE APARTMENTS, LP, EVERETT ASCHER, MARY ASCHER, and MERIDIAN MANAGEMENT GROUP's Motion To Bifurcate Issues Of Liability And Punitive Damages is OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1013, i.e. motion set on 16-court days without accounting for electronic service. Additionally, issue of bifurcation shall be raised before the trial judge. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
